team.date_founded: Founded by the metal-extraction crews of Psyche, the great metallic asteroid.
team.number_of_fans: Around 18 million, hard as the metal they mine.
team.badge: A glowing ingot struck on an anvil, sparks flying.
team.home_kit: Molten orange and gunmetal with a forged-metal sheen.
team.history: Psyche Metallics are built on raw physical power — an aggressive, muscular side that out-muscles and out-fights opponents into submission. On the great metal asteroid, strength is everything, and the Forgers have plenty.
team.club_culture: Hard, physical, and aggressive. The Forgers believe football is a test of strength first.
team.political_leaning: Belt industrial-syndicalist — a foundry-workers' club with muscle.
trophy_cabinet: A reputation as the belt's most physically dominant side
legends: Anvil Strode — the midfield destroyer no one enjoyed facing
achievements: Most duels and physical battles won in the belt

stadium.date_built: Built beside the great metal foundries of Psyche.
stadium.sponsors: Backed by the metal-extraction and smelting guilds.
stadium.pitch_size: Standard, with a heavy, physical feel.
stadium.pitch_type: Hardy synthetic turf rated for the metallic asteroid's conditions.
stadium.bio: The Forge is a hot, loud, industrial bowl beside the smelters where the crowd roars for every crunching tackle. Away sides find it a physical and mental ordeal.

training_facility.date_built: A standard complex built into the foundry district.
training_facility.bio: The Core Training Campus drills physical conditioning and aggression, forging players as hard as the metal around them.

manager.appearance: Broad and heavy, with the build of a man who worked the foundries.
manager.bio: Forge Petrov is an aggressive coach who builds physically overwhelming sides. His Metallics dominate the muscle battle and grind opponents down through sheer force.
manager.playing_history: A bruising defensive midfielder feared across the belt.
manager.playing_philosophy: Win the physical battle and the football follows. Be stronger, be harder, never back down.
manager.culture: A foundry man who believes in strength above all.
achievements: Built the belt's most physical side

managing_staff.appearance: Hulking and intense, runs brutal conditioning sessions.
managing_staff.bio: Forge Nakamura builds the raw physical power that lets the Metallics overwhelm opponents, the architect of their muscle.
managing_staff.playing_philosophy: Strength is trainable. Make them the hardest team on the pitch.

players.appearance: Big and commanding, fills the goal.
players.bio: Magnesium Reyes is the balanced, imposing keeper who dominates his box physically.
achievements: Most claimed crosses in the side

players.appearance: Powerful and tireless, grafts the flank.
players.bio: Chrome Cruz is the workhorse full-back who bullies wingers and runs all day.
achievements: Most distance covered by a defender

players.appearance: Selfless and immense, the heart of defence.
players.bio: Iron Okafor is the team-first colossus who marshals the Forgers' powerful back line.

players.appearance: Bullish and ferocious, attacks every duel.
players.bio: Nickel Sato is the aggressive enforcer who wins every physical battle at the back.
achievements: Most duels won in the side

players.appearance: Vast and balanced, the powerful reader.
players.bio: Cobalt Lee is the composed defender who reads the game so his strength rarely needs proving.

players.appearance: Slighter and inventive, the rare craft.
players.bio: Coil Kim is the creative spark amid the muscle, the one Forger asked to make something delicate.
achievements: Most chances created in the side

players.bio: Static Mori is the selfless midfield workhorse who wins the ball and powers the side.

players.appearance: Strong and balanced, the controlling pivot.
players.bio: Spark Nakamura is the composed midfielder who keeps the Forgers' power purposeful.
achievements: Highest pass volume in the side

players.bio: Alloy Rivera is the selfish target striker who bullies defences and finishes the power.

players.appearance: Direct and ferocious, the battering forward.
players.bio: Ferrous Patel is the aggressive forward who batters back lines into submission.
achievements: Most fouls won by a forward

players.appearance: Self-assured and powerful, the wide weapon.
players.bio: Steel Novak is the selfish wide forward who turns the Forgers' dominance into goals.

players.appearance: Older and careful, the calm deputy keeper.
players.bio: Weld Torres is the cautious veteran second keeper, dependable when called.

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the dependable squad defender.
players.bio: Solder Anderson is the team-first deputy who keeps the powerful block intact in rotation.

players.appearance: Young and powerful, an academy giant on the rise.
players.bio: Flux Martinez is the promising young defender being forged into the next Metallics colossus.

players.appearance: Inventive and raw, an academy playmaker in waiting.
players.bio: Arc Chandra is the creative deputy who offers a rare delicate touch from the bench.

players.appearance: Lean and hungry, an academy striker with a selfish edge.
players.bio: Forge Ito is the eager young finisher pushing for a place among the Forgers.
